name: Dark Split-Sword
description: Use as a devastating heavy sword or apply a Dual Melee stance and split the weapon into two ferocious blades.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Use as a devastating heavy sword or apply a Dual Melee stance and split the weapon into two ferocious blades.

components.name: Dual Skana
components.description: A shorter Skana in each hand. Can hit multiple targets.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to equip the Dark Split-Sword with any skins.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to use Stance Forma or Umbra Forma on the Dark Split-Sword.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that could occur for the new Host of an Archwing mission due to prior Host migration if they had the Dark Split-Sword equipped.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to Polarize the Dark Split-Sword with Stance Forma or Umbra Forma.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip Dual-Sword Stance Mods on the Dark Split-Sword as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1026272-dark-split-sword-bug-fix-pending/ .

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash when Modding/entering a mission with the Dark Split-Sword.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dark Split-Sword Affinity and Focus being lost when a Host migration occurs.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sugatras attaching incorrectly to the Dark Split-Sword when equipped with the Dominion Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Holster customizations not applying to the Dark Split-Sword.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect sheathing of the Dark Split-Sword when equipped with a Dual Sword Stance Mod (Crossing Snakes, Swirling Tiger, Dividing Blades).

patchlogs.name: Recurring Nightmares
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect entries for the Dark Split-Sword in player profile.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Increased Dark Split-Swords Critical Chance while dual wielding by to 25% and Critical Multiplier to 2.5x.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.14.2
patchlogs.changes:
•    The Dark Split-Sword can now be used in the Conclave!
•    Visually tweaked the Dark Split-Sword’s Energy trail to fit better on the weapon.
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed the Dark Split-Sword not listed in the Melee section of the Codex.
•    Fixed ranked Stance Mods equipped on the Dark Split-Sword being un-ranked.
